tasks.label: MSP430: 2. Direkt Flash Belleğe Yaz (Flash)
tasks.command: docker exec -i msp430_running_container pkill mspdebug || true; docker exec -i msp430_running_container mspdebug rf2500 'prog /workspace/build/main.elf'

tasks.label: MSP430: GDB Sunucusunu Baslat
tasks.command: docker exec -i msp430_running_container mkdir -p /home/ahmet/orunlab/projs/platforms/msp430-lab && docker exec -i msp430_running_container ln -sfn /workspace /home/ahmet/orunlab/projs/platforms/msp430-lab/projects; docker exec -i msp430_running_container pkill mspdebug || true; sleep 1; docker exec -i msp430_running_container mspdebug rf2500 'gdb 3333'

background.endsPattern: Bound to port 3333. Now waiting for connection...
